---
title: Version Control with Git and GitHub Within RStudio
categories: Workshop
event:
  description: ''
  start_date: '2024-01-15'
  end_date: ''
  time: ''
  location:
    name: LMU Open Science Center (Giselastr.) Hybrid (Leopoldstraße 13, room 3322, Munich and via Zoom)
    address: Leopoldstraße 13, Room 3322, 80802 Munich
    map_url: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Ludwig-Maximilian-Universit%C3%A4t+M%C3%BCnchen/@48.1559372,11.5833416,19.19z/data=!3m1!5s0x479e75bf863d5581:0x29d36540810c2590!4m6!3m5!1s0x479e75c07933e683:0x4851cac28ba68cb4!8m2!3d48.1558072!4d11.5829777!16s%2Fg%2F1hc2d61v7?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDUyMC4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
  format:
    type: Hybrid
    detail: ''
  language:
    primary: English
    primary-code: en
    detail: ''
links:
  registration: ''
  materials: https://github.com/lmu-osc/Introduction-RStudio-Git-GitHub
  workshop_website: ''
event_description: ''
instructors:
- name: Dr. Malika Ihle
  url: ''
helpers:
- name: Pat Callahan
  url: ''
- name: Felix Henninger
  url: ''
- name: Alp Aksu
  url: ''
contact:
  name: Malika Ihle
  email: malika.ihle@lmu.de
organizers:
- name: Dr. Malika Ihle
  url: ''
host:
- name: LMU Open Science Center
  url: ''
template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---

<br>

 

<p>Are you working within RStudio to wrangle and analyses your data?</p><p>Join this 3 hours workshop to learn how to track and manage changes in your code so you never have to save multiple copies of your script again (e.g. before deleting a piece of code or trying a new function, or just for back-up!). Version control with Git and GitHub will make your workflow cleaner and more reproducible and allow you to code (or even write manuscripts) collaboratively.</p><p>This workshop will focus on how to use Git and Github within the RStudio IDE and consists in facilitated self-paced tutorials: <a href="https://github.com/lmu-osc/Introduction-RStudio-Git-GitHub">https://github.com/lmu-osc/Introduction-RStudio-Git-GitHub</a> and <a href="https://github.com/lmu-osc/Collaborative-RStudio-GitHub">https://github.com/lmu-osc/Collaborative-RStudio-GitHub</a> that include the setting up and configuring of all software required.</p><p><strong>Participants</strong>: The targeted audience are novices regarding version control / Git, but who use RStudio at least occasionally. No R knowledge is necessary.</p><p><strong>Requirement</strong>: Participants must have their own laptop with admin access. Software will be installed as part of the workshop. No previous knowledge necessary.</p>
